title: Live Patch

general.note: Haunted Mines added to Ranked play.
Players can now party with unplaced players in Storm League.

notes: Additional brush added in several locations.
Warhead channel penalty on interrupt reduced (10s → 5s).

heroes.name: Abathur
notes: Locust Strain reworked — health 350 → 225, damage 58 → 36, Locusts now self-heal (20% of damage dealt, 20% max health when a minion dies nearby), bonus damage to non-Heroes now 100%.
Envenomed Nests armor reduction 10 → 15.
Locust Brood moved to Level 1 (cooldown 45s → 75s); Survival Instincts moved to Level 16.
New Level 4 talent Slapathur: Basic Attacks deal 350% bonus damage and stun for 3 seconds.
Evolve Monstrosity now displays as a Quest with a unit frame.

heroes.name: Alexstrasza
notes: Dragonqueen cooldown 150s → 130s (now starts after expiration).
Breath of Life healing 20% → 15%; Preservation healing 30% → 25%.
Flames of Fury cooldown 5s → 6s with a new Mythic quest (hit 40 Heroes without dying to refresh Dragonqueen duration).
Lifeblossom removes Slows/Roots and persists through transformation.
Live and Let Live grants an additional 25% charge recharge rate.
On Ruby Wings refreshes if it hits 3 or more Heroes.
Ancient Flame gains an additional 25% Health bonus.
Draconic Discipline now reduces Preservation cooldown per Hero healed instead of extending duration.

heroes.name: Blaze
notes: Adrenaline Stimpack Attack Speed bonus 100% → 85%.
Bunker Drop cooldown 80s → 85s.

heroes.name: Cho
notes: Consuming Fire healing bonus becomes flat 75 health; Calloused Hide threshold 60% → 50%.
Firestarter cooldown reduction 1s → 1.5s per attack.

heroes.name: Gall
notes: Rising Dread bonus 25% → 20%.
Bomb's Away stacks uncapped but damage 5 → 4 per stack.
Double Trouble cooldown reduction 0.5s → 1s.
Leaden Orb stun 0.75s → 0.6s.

heroes.name: Chromie
notes: Dragon's Breath now shows a radius preview to enemies.
Time Trap health 400 → 250.
Once Again The First Time quest 40 → 20 stacks but requires no deaths.
Deep Breathing 1% → 0.5% per stack, uncapped.
Chronic Conditions now auto-activates on enemy contact; slow/speed 30% → 20%.
Here and There range 20 → 40 with snap targeting.

heroes.name: Diablo
notes: Shadow Charge damage 40 → 45, terrain collision damage 130 → 140; Overpower damage 73 → 80.
Fire Stomp damage reduced (12 → 11, return 36 → 34).
Diabolical Momentum cooldown reduction 1.5s → 2s per attack.
Dying Breath cooldown 25s → 30s.
Lord of Terror health steal 10% → 12%.

heroes.name: Genji
notes: Swift as the Wind Movement Speed 30% → 40%; Pathfinder duration 4s → 6s.
Strike at the Heart damage 134 → 142.
Perfect Defense cooldown reduction 2s → 2.5s; Flow Like Water cooldown reduction 3s → 4s.
Final Cut damage 125 → 115.

heroes.name: Hogger
notes: On the Prowl rage generation 30 → 25.
Hogger's Joggers rage threshold 30 → 35.

heroes.name: Johanna
notes: Shield Glare cooldown 12s → 13s.
Blessed Shield cooldown 60s → 65s.

heroes.name: Mal'Ganis
notes: Will of Tichondrius: the talent's bonus stun duration reduced from 0.5s to 0.25s.
Blind as a Bat now has a 0.2s reactivation delay between swipes.

heroes.name: Qhira
notes: Blood Rage gains a baseline quest (+0.25% damage per stack); bleed damage 11 → 8.
Revolving Sweep can no longer be detached by the target becoming Unstoppable.
Fatal Wounds bonus 30% → 50% against low-health Heroes (quest removed).

heroes.name: Ragnaros
notes: Molten Core reworked — cooldown 120s → 180s, health 3996 → 5000, duration 18s → 23s, now stuns for 1 second on exit; ability range starts at 20 and grows to 35 over 9 seconds.
Molten Swing damage 161 → 250 with knockback (cooldown 6s → 9s).
Meteor Shower damage 151 → 200, +66% area, 35% slow (cooldown 2.5s → 6s).
Explosive Rune cooldown 4s → 2.5s, damage now 440 over 5 seconds.
Blast Wave damage 104 → 120.
Engulfing Flame bonus 75% → 50%.
Lava Surge no longer reduces cooldowns; now grants minion speed.
Heroic Difficulty reworked.
Sulfuras Smash gains a new Mythic quest (hit 8 Heroes for an extra charge).

heroes.name: Thrall
notes: Crash Lightning disabled in ARAM.

heroes.name: Whitemane
notes: Searing Lash gains a new quest (+3 max health, +2 mana per Hero hit).
Pity the Frail cooldown 1.5s → 1s.
Inquisitor's Prayer restores 25 mana per Hero and extends Zeal by 2 seconds.
Intercession cooldown 45s → 60s.
Scarlet Wrath mana return 0.5% → 1%.
Guiding Light grants 15% Spell Power from Zeal.

heroes.name: Yrel
notes: Basic ability buffs with mana costs reduced (65 → 50): Vindication heal 320 → 370 and damage 140 → 160, Righteous Hammer stun 0.75s → 1s and damage 125 → 140, Avenging Wrath slow 50% → 60% and damage 225 → 260.
Divine Purpose cooldown 8s → 12s; cooldown refund when a basic ability is interrupted reduced from 8s to 3s, and it no longer resets on heroic use.

bug_fixes: General: Fort, Keep, and Core attack beams are now more visible when targeting Heroes.
Maps: Haunted Mines — fixed auto-mount issue when using Hearthstone inside the mines. Warhead Junction — fixed Hero visibility during Warhead launch and persistent channel beam on interrupt.
Ana: Eye of Horus no longer reveals global lines at structures; minor damage delay removed.
Arthas: Howling Blast visuals now match its area; Froststrike slow baseline issues resolved.
Deathwing: No longer teleports if killed during Cataclysm.
D.Va: Defense Matrix damage reduction now properly applies to summoned units.
Jaina: Ultimate Evolution clones now correctly inherit spell power across multiple abilities.
Nazeebo: Voodoo Ritual quest indicator and tooltip corrections.
Xul: Skeletal unit Defense Matrix and evasion interaction fixes.
Yrel: Avenging Wrath is no longer interrupted by Roots during channeling.
Additional fixes for Anub'arak, Deckard, Hogger, Kerrigan, Leoric, Malfurion, Medivh, Nova, Probius, Tychus, and Zagara.
